global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with product illustrations and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a limited stock offer and free shipping.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font, likely in white or contrasting color.

elements.label: Product illustration
elements.description: A simple illustration of two rectangular shapes resembling a product, centered in the ad with a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Product illustration
elements.description: Another product illustration, slightly overlapping with the first, maintaining a clean and modern aesthetic.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned near the product illustrations, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text stating 'Limited stock Free shipping over $25' is displayed in a clear, readable font, likely in white for contrast.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text '€29.99 Install now', designed to stand out with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, likely in a bright color to attract attention.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner with the text 'UGC', indicating user-generated content, in a simple font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, product illustrations are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
